items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 I wanted to play this game from qhite a
items.summary: I wanted to play this game from qhite a while ago, but I was unable to download it on my phone as the internal data download speed was WAY too slow. I played it on my PC instead but wasn't as invested so I'm trying again on my phone and hoping the download works properly this time. Edit: It works perfectly now! I've been addicted since yesterday 😭 and thank you so much for the free pulls, I wish this game succeeds to the heavens.
items.author: Arka Biswas
